items.description: the home stock table renders a 'Batch Number' column and a 'Serial Number' column when stock records with populated batch_number and serial_number exist

the stock-list route (app/routes/) does not import app/repositories or the DB session; batch_number and serial_number are projected at the route boundary with no column computation inside the component
the SKU detail view renders batch number and serial number as separate labeled fields for each location row when the stock record has batch_number and serial_number populated
a stock row with a NULL batch_number renders 'not tracked' in the Batch Number column of the home stock table
a stock row with a NULL serial_number renders 'not tracked' in the Serial Number column of the home stock table

the S4 E2E test suite binds to the real Lakebase branch DB (DB_NAME=stockflow); no mock or in-memory substitute is used and the conftest fixture verifies the live connection before any S4 scenario runs
a stock record with a NULL batch_number at a location renders 'not tracked' in the batch number field of the SKU detail view
a stock record with a NULL serial_number at a location renders 'not tracked' in the serial number field of the SKU detail view
